title: Codex Final Report
description: Schema enforced via `codex exec --output-schema` so the executor's final message is machine-readable. Catches training-data bleed-through (free-form claims like 'X is now complete' for projects that aren't this one) by forcing every field to map to repo state the orchestrator can verify.

phases_completed.description: Phases or numbered steps from the module spec that were completed. Use the exact step numbers/names from CLAUDE.md.

files_modified.description: Repository-relative paths of modified existing files.

files_created.description: Repository-relative paths of newly created files.

tests_run.description: Each test command actually executed and its outcome.

proposed_commits.description: Suggested commit boundaries for the orchestrator. Codex MUST NOT commit; the orchestrator inspects the working tree and applies these.

paths.description: Repository-relative paths included in this commit.

deviations.description: Anywhere this run departed from the spec. Empty array if perfect compliance.

open_questions.description: Questions Codex couldn't resolve and wants the orchestrator to decide.
